miscfeatures.config.title: JulieISBaka Misc Booty
miscfeatures.config.developer_mode.label: Cap'n mode
miscfeatures.config.developer_mode.toolt: Unlocks the dangerous charts fer misc-features.
When raised, the max radius be no longer capped by the menu.
Open this scroll again after changin' the toggle to refresh cap'n-only entries.
miscfeatures.config.verbose_logging.tool: Writes detailed tales of misc-features command voyages.
Cap'n mode must be raised for this to matter.
miscfeatures.config.anvil.auto_insert_ar: When raised, /anvil stows yer main-hand armor piece into slot 1.
Only works if yer main hand holds armor and slot 1 be empty.
miscfeatures.config.anvil.auto_insert_we: When raised, /anvil stows yer main-hand weapon or tool into slot 1.
Includes damageable tools/weapons, bows, crossbows, and tridents.
miscfeatures.config.anvil.auto_insert_na: When raised, /anvil stows a main-hand name tag into slot 1.
miscfeatures.config.enchant.allow_negati: When raised, enchant levels below zero be accepted.
miscfeatures.config.enchant.allow_high_l: When enabled, enchant levels above 255 are accepted as unsafe developer behavior.
miscfeatures.config.enchant.prevent_crea: Prevent creative packet crash on unsafe enchants
When enabled, negative and >255 enchants are blocked for creative targets to avoid known creative-slot packet crashes.
Disable this if you want fully unsafe behavior and accept crash risk.
miscfeatures.config.enchant.fix_high_lev: Fixes enchant tooltip levels above 10 so they show readable words instead o' raw translation keys.
miscfeatures.config.enchant.high_level_s: Switches fixed high-level magic display between numbers and Roman marks.
miscfeatures.config.max_search_radius.to: Cap'n mode removes the menu cap, but the command still obeys this value.
miscfeatures.config.max_search_radius.no: In normal seas this setting be capped at %s.
miscfeatures.config.search_unloaded_chun: When lowered, /find block skips blocks in chunks not already loaded.
When raised, /find block may force chunk access beyond the loaded waters.
When lowered, /find item skips containers in chunks not already loaded.
When raised, /find item may force chunk access beyond the loaded waters.
When lowered, /find entity only inspects critters in already loaded chunks.
When raised, /find entity may load chunks in range before scannin'.
miscfeatures.config.max_search_results.t: Limits how many /find block matches are printed per block or tag target.
The total count still be reported when the list be cut short.
miscfeatures.config.max_item_search_radi: Cap'n mode removes the menu cap, but the command still obeys this value.
In normal seas this setting be capped at %s.
miscfeatures.config.max_find_item_result: Limits how many container matches /find item prints per loot or tag target.
The total loot and container counts still be reported when the list be cut short.
miscfeatures.config.max_entity_search_ra: Cap'n mode removes the menu cap, but entity searches still only use loaded critters in this world.
Entity searches only use loaded critters in this world.
miscfeatures.config.max_find_entity_resu: Limits how many entity matches /find entity prints per critter or tag target.
The total count still be reported when the list be cut short.
